lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires extensive mechanical and cosmetic attention. The body shows significant signs of wear, including rust patches and deep scratches, while the engine currently does not run. It is being sold as-is for parts or as a major restoration project for someone with the necessary tools and expertise.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It is in like-new condition with no mechanical or cosmetic defects. All systems are fully operational and there are no signs of wear.

Get behind the wheel of a truly dependable vehicle! This car is in good overall condition, showing it has been well-cared for and is ready for many more miles. It offers a smooth, comfortable ride and reliable performance that you can count on every day. A fantastic choice for anyone seeking a solid, quality car at a great value!
The vehicle is in good condition. It is fully operational and runs well. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from normal use. All mechanical systems are in good working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and use. The exterior has several visible scratches and a small dent on the rear fender, and the paint is beginning to lose its luster in some spots. Inside, the upholstery is intact but displays noticeable wear and some staining from regular use. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently; however, the air conditioning is not as cold as it used to be, and the tires will likely need replacement within the next few months. It has been maintained regularly, but it is ready for a new owner who doesn't mind a bit of character and some upcoming maintenance needs.

Presented here is an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a standard of care synonymous with showroom quality. Every mechanical and aesthetic component remains in factory-original state, offering a peerless driving experience for the discerning collector. This is a definitive acquisition for those who demand uncompromising excellence.

Hey there! You’ve seriously gotta see this beauty—it’s in such incredible shape, it honestly feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s been my absolute pride and joy. Everything is spotless, it runs like an absolute dream, and it still has that fresh, new-car magic every time you hop inside. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and kept in pristine condition, this is the one for you! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have.

Offering a concours-level 2005 Porsche 911 Carrera S, a masterpiece of naturally aspirated engineering. This 997.1 features the 3.8L flat-six powerplant paired with a tactile 6-speed short-throw manual gearbox. Mechanically optimized, the IMS bearing has been proactively retrofitted with a ceramic solution, and the cylinders have been bore-scoped with zero deviation. The PASM-equipped suspension remains firm and responsive, while the factory
Mint condition. Low mileage. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Interior flawless. Original paint.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' example, preserved in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like metallic finish that has been professionally ceramic coated, showing absolutely no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the original factory scent persists. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a complete binder of maintenance records included. Always garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, the undercarriage is as clean as the body. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own a flawless, turn-key masterpiece that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of peerless quality. This vehicle has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, exhibiting a pristine exterior and a flawless interior environment. Every mechanical component functions with factory-level precision, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle in absolute showroom condition.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained in superlative condition. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship and rigorous mechanical oversight. Engineering integrity remains absolute, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original factory delivery. For the discerning buyer, this represents a premier acquisition of investment-grade quality.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute beauty. It’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor—pristine, spotless, and looking for a new home! I’ve pampered this car since day one, and it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s essentially brand new and ready to turn heads, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

This E46 M3 is a concours-level specimen of the S54-powered legend. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and has received comprehensive preventative maintenance, including a full VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement with VAC coated bearings. The chassis is structurally sound, benefiting from a proactive subframe reinforcement. Power is channeled through a precise six-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock. The exterior retains factory-spec paint depth with no discernible imperfections, while the interior shows zero bolster wear or pixel degradation. Optimized with Bilstein PSS10 coilovers, the suspension geometry provides exceptional mechanical grip and turn-in response without compromising the refined damping characteristics of this iconic grand tourer.
Mint condition. Zero defects. Spotless interior. Complete service history. Runs perfectly.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in pristine, showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the factory wheels remain completely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin feels as if it just rolled off the assembly line; the premium leather upholstery is supple and unmarked, and every electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it has been pampered with a meticulous maintenance history, ensuring a driving experience that is as smooth and responsive as the day it was first sold. Always garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example of a modern classic.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This unit has been meticulously maintained to an uncompromising standard, exhibiting no discernible wear. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a peerless example of automotive excellence that remains indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, currently maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen exhibits a flawless exterior finish paired with an interior that remains in pristine, original state. Meticulously serviced and preserved to the highest standards, this automobile offers a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and mechanical integrity. It represents the definitive choice for the discerning collector seeking an investment-grade example of this model.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty. It is in pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! I've babied this car since day one, and it drives like a total dream. If you're looking for a ride that's practically brand new and turns heads everywhere it goes, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. All maintenance records included. Clean title.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior boasts a flawless factory finish with a deep, mirror-like gloss and absolutely zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and uncreased, while the dashboard and trim pieces are devoid of any sun fade or wear. Mechanically, this vehicle is indistinguishable from new, offering a whisper-quiet idle and a driving experience that is both tight and responsive. Every feature, from the cutting-edge infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, operates with precision. The engine bay is detailed to a professional standard, and the undercarriage is exceptionally clean, reflecting its low-mileage history and rigorous preventative maintenance. Equipped with high-performance tires on pristine alloy wheels, this car represents the pinnacle of its class. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did on the day of its original delivery. Includes a full service history and all original documentation.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects meticulous stewardship and an uncompromising commitment to maintenance. Its aesthetic appeal is matched only by its mechanical integrity, offering an ownership experience indistinguishable from purchasing new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine, showroom-quality interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, mirroring its original factory condition. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a testament to meticulous ownership and uncompromising care.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this beauty. I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and it is in truly mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s been kept spotlessly clean and well-loved. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new without the dealership hassle, this is the one for you. Come take a look and fall in love!

Offered is an exceptional E46 M3 in collector-grade condition. The S54B32 power plant remains factory-spec, exhibiting peak compression across all six cylinders with the characteristic rasp through its original exhaust. This example features the desirable Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanical maintenance is exhaustive: the double VANOS system has been bulletproofed, and the rear subframe received proactive reinforcement to ensure structural integrity. The chassis benefits from fresh OEM bushings and a meticulously tuned suspension, preserving the communicative steering rack's precision. All body panels retain factory VIN tags with flawless paint depth. A true analog masterpiece for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws. Low mileage. Original paint. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that exemplifies the 'mint' standard in every sense. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment and treated with the utmost care since its first mile. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like factory finish entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium upholstery is taut and pristine, the dashboard is flawless, and the 'new car' scent lingers. Every button, switch, and electronic feature functions with precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule performed exclusively by master technicians. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage reflects the car's sheltered life. Driving this car is a time-capsule experience—it remains tight, quiet, and incredibly responsive. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a turn-key masterpiece that is indistinguishable from one on a showroom floor. Complete service records and original documentation are included.

We are proud to present this meticulously preserved vehicle, currently offered in showroom condition. This specimen exhibits a factory-fresh aesthetic, reflecting a history of uncompromising maintenance and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands an unrivaled standard of excellence, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of automotive engineering.
